title: Build a <.button> function component with slot + attrs
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/components/button.ex (module MyAppWeb.Components.Button). Define button/1 with attrs :type (string, default "button", values ["button", "submit", "reset"]), :variant (string, default "primary", values ["primary", "secondary", "danger"]), :disabled (boolean, default false), :class (string, default nil), :rest (:global, include: ~w(form name value)), and slot :inner_block (required). Render <button type={@type} disabled={@disabled} class={["btn", "btn-#{@variant}", @class]} {@rest}>{render_slot(@inner_block)}</button>.
tier_rationale: Multi-attribute component with slot, values, and :global — a standard core_components pattern but several pieces must all be right.
